problem: Henry walked on a flat field 9 meters due north from a tree. He then turned due east and walked 24 feet. He then turned due south and walked 9 meters plus 32 feet. How many feet away from his original starting point is Henry?

classified_questions.question: What direction did Henry walk after going 9 meters due north?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: After walking 24 feet east, in which direction did Henry turn?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How far did Henry walk after turning due south?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: What is the relationship between the lengths of the legs of the right triangle and the length of the hypotenuse?
